nasb.text: Then Saul hurled his spear at him to strike him down; so Jonathan knew that his father had decided to put David to death.

esv.text: But Saul hurled his spear at him to strike him. So Jonathan knew that his father was determined to put David to death.

cnv.text: 掃羅向著約拿單把槍擲過去，要刺殺他。約拿單就知道，他父親已經決意要殺死大衛。

ccb.text: 扫罗气得把矛掷向约拿单，想要杀他。约拿单知道父亲决意要杀大卫。
